THOUGHT: I am facing right, but the cell ahead is lava. I need to go down to reach the left column path. So I will turn clockwise to face down.
ACTION: GIRA_HORARIO

THOUGHT: The cell directly ahead is empty, so I can move forward to start going down towards the bottom row.
ACTION: FRENTE

THOUGHT: I am facing down, and the cell directly below is empty. I need to keep moving down to eventually reach the bottom row.
ACTION: FRENTE

THOUGHT: I need to move down to reach the bottom row, then later go right and up to navigate around lava cells.
ACTION: FRENTE

THOUGHT: I need to move down to the bottom row, then navigate to the right to reach column 3, then go up and around the lava.
ACTION: FRENTE

ACTION: FRENTE

ACTION: FRENTE

THOUGHT: I need to move right to avoid lava. Currently facing down, so I must turn anti-clockwise to face right.
ACTION: GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

THOUGHT: Current position row7 col1 facing right. Next cell to the right (col2) is empty, so move forward to progress.
ACTION: FRENTE

ACTION: FRENTE

THOUGHT: I need to go up to row3 to cross horizontally, then go right, up, right, and down to goal. Next step is to move forward.
ACTION: FRENTE

THOUGHT: I am at (5,3) facing up. Moving up twice will bring me to row3, where I can go right across to col7 and then down to the goal. Next step is to move up.
ACTION: FRENTE
